title: The Shift: Narrow AI to AGI
html:
The Shift: Narrow AI to AGI

Narrow AI (Specialized)
Task Focus Optimized for single, defined functions like chess or image recognition.
Static Logic Operates within fixed constraints and pre-defined datasets.
Tool Nature Acts as a specialized utility for solving a specific problem.
General AI (Emergent)
General Reasoning Cross-domain synthesis allowing for flexible problem solving.
LLM Scale Massive parameter growth enabling emergent cognitive capabilities.
Productivity Leaps Generative AI transforms creators from executors to orchestrators.
